title: CTIA Compliance
html:
US carrier-industry SMS compliance standard (Cellular Telecommunications Industry Association) — toll-free SMS senders must publish a public opt-in form disclosing use case, message frequency, data rates, STOP/HELP keywords, and a privacy policy. The exact gate that blocked Vrtl Pirates' telnyx toll-free verification four times in a row Oct–Nov 2025, stalling outpace's SMS leaderboard. First mentioned in 2025 10 22 screenshot 2025 10 22 at 7 51 16 pm 77463179.

#stub
